allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Kong version:', d.get\('version','?'\)\); print\('DB reachable:', d.get\('database',{}\).get\('reachable','?'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Keycloak issuer:', d.get\('issuer','NOT READY'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); plugins=list\(d.get\('plugins',{}\).get\('available_on_server',{}\).keys\(\)\); print\('jwt:', 'jwt' in plugins\); print\('ip-restriction:', 'ip-restriction' in plugins\); print\('request-transformer:', 'request-transformer' in plugins\); print\('rate-limiting:', 'rate-limiting' in plugins\)")

PowerShell($adminToken = \(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/realms/master/protocol/openid-connect/token -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded" -d "client_id=admin-cli&grant_type=password&username=admin&password=admin" | ConvertFrom-Json\).access_token; Write-Host "got token: $\($adminToken.Substring\(0,30\)\)...")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; [print\(p['name'], p['id']\) for p in json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if 'keycloak' in k.lower\(\) or 'auth' in k.lower\(\) or 'oidc' in k.lower\(\)]")
